printed.name: Frog
printed.setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs parallel, one foot in strap, dorsiflexed, hip and knee at 90 degrees, other leg placed on Mat, leg straight, foot plantarflexed, arms bent, 90 degrees in shoulder and elbow joints, hands holding poles

movement.inhale: Bend leg, return to start position

cues: Keep heel traveling along horizontal line
Keep supporting leg elongated and stable
